info.title: panmira N1 API
info.description: panmira N1 OpenAPI 3.0 spec. L5-L12 era (commit c2a9e725). Chat and team routes marked for deletion are NOT included. 93 source routes scanned; auto-merged into OpenAPI.

get.description: Initiate user authentication. Supports password and Feishu OAuth flows.

post.description: Submit password for authentication.
Invalidate current session.
Exchange refresh_token for new access_token.

get.description: Get the current authenticated user. Scope: user:read.

post.description: Handle Feishu OAuth redirect.
Bind Feishu account to current user.

get.description: Check Feishu OAuth status.

post.description: Unbind Feishu account.
Create a new user account (admin only).

get.description: Verify email ownership via token.

post.description: Send password reset email.
Reset password with token.

get.description: List all users in current tenant. Scope: user:admin.
RFC 8414 OAuth 2.0 Authorization Server Metadata.
JSON Web Key Set for token verification.

post.description: OAuth 2.0 token revocation (RFC 7009).

get.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization endpoint.

post.description: User confirms the authorization grant.
OAuth 2.0 token endpoint. Supports authorization_code, refresh_token, client_credentials grants.

get.description: OIDC userinfo endpoint.
List all OAuth clients in tenant. Scope: oauth:admin.

post.description: Register a new OAuth client. Scope: oauth:admin.

get.description: Retrieve a single OAuth client. Scope: oauth:admin.

patch.description: Modify an OAuth client. Scope: oauth:admin.

delete.description: Remove an OAuth client. Scope: oauth:admin.

post.description: Generate a new client secret. Scope: oauth:admin.

get.description: Return all scopes that can be requested.
List agents scoped to a bot via x-bot-name header.

post.description: Route an intent to the best-matching agent and execute. Scope: agent:run.

get.description: List pending approval items. Scope: agent:admin.

post.description: Approve or reject a pending action. Scope: agent:admin.

get.description: List all agents in current tenant. Scope: agent:read.

post.description: Create a new agent template. Scope: agent:admin.

get.description: Retrieve a single agent by ID. Scope: agent:read.

patch.description: Modify an existing agent. Scope: agent:admin.

post.description: Execute an agent against a query. Supports RAG via agent KB refs. Scope: agent:edit.

get.description: List knowledge base references attached to an agent. Scope: agent:read.

post.description: Attach a knowledge base to an agent. Scope: agent:edit.

delete.description: Detach a knowledge base from an agent. Scope: agent:edit.

get.description: List recent agent run logs filtered by templateId/deploymentType. Scope: agent:read.
Get aggregated stats for agent run logs. Scope: agent:read.
List all pipelines (DAGs) in current tenant. **L5 new endpoint.** Scope: agent:read, agent:admin.

post.description: Create a new pipeline. **L5 new endpoint.** Supports retryPolicy (L8), triggerType. Scope: agent:admin.

get.description: Retrieve a pipeline by ID. **L5 new endpoint.** Scope: agent:read, agent:admin.

patch.description: Modify a pipeline. **L5 new endpoint.** Scope: agent:admin.

delete.description: Remove a pipeline. **L5 new endpoint.** Scope: agent:admin.

post.description: Trigger a pipeline execution. Supports ?async=true for L6 async mode (returns 202 immediately). L7 broadcasts WS progress events. Scope: agent:admin, agent:run.

get.description: List execution history for a pipeline. **L5 new endpoint.** Scope: agent:read, agent:admin.
Get a single run detail with messages. **L5 new endpoint.** Scope: agent:read, agent:admin.

post.description: Clear bot-template and pipeline cache. **Phase 4 L3 Fix 3.** Scope: agent:admin.

get.description: List all scheduled jobs (cron/event/manual). Scope: agent:read, agent:admin.

post.description: Create a new scheduled job. Scope: agent:admin.

get.description: Retrieve a scheduled job by ID. Scope: agent:read, agent:admin.

patch.description: Modify a scheduled job. Scope: agent:admin.

delete.description: Remove a scheduled job. Scope: agent:admin.

post.description: Manually trigger a job now. Scope: agent:admin.

get.description: List skill DAG definitions, optionally filtered by skillId. Scope: skill:read, skill:admin.

post.description: Create a new versioned skill DAG. Scope: skill:admin.

get.description: Retrieve a skill DAG by ID. Scope: skill:read, skill:admin.

put.description: Replace a skill DAG (creates new version). Scope: skill:admin.

delete.description: Soft-delete a skill DAG (validationStatus="deleted"). Scope: skill:admin.

get.description: List skills available in the public catalog.
Get a single catalog entry.

post.description: Install a skill from the catalog into the current tenant. Scope: skill:admin.

get.description: Aggregate skill hub dashboard.
List all skill categories.
Full-text search across skills.

post.description: Submit a 1-5 star rating.

get.description: List all KBs in current tenant. Scope: knowledge:read.

post.description: Create a new KB. Scope: knowledge:admin.

get.description: Retrieve a KB by ID. Scope: knowledge:read.

delete.description: Remove a KB and all its documents. Scope: knowledge:admin.

post.description: Vector search over a KB. Scope: knowledge:read.
Upload a document to a KB and trigger embedding. Scope: knowledge:edit.

get.description: List documents in a KB. Scope: knowledge:read.
Alternative path for KB retrieval. Scope: knowledge:read.
Get async embedding job status (pending/processing/completed/failed). Scope: knowledge:read, knowledge:admin.
List extracted memories for current tenant. Scope: memory:read.

post.description: Run memory extraction over recent interactions. Scope: memory:admin.
Submit feedback on a memory (helpful / not). Scope: memory:read.

get.description: List configured LLM providers. Scope: provider:read.

post.description: Register a new LLM provider. Scope: provider:admin.

get.description: Retrieve a provider by ID. Scope: provider:read.

patch.description: Modify a provider config. Scope: provider:admin.

get.description: List models in the model pool. Scope: model:read.

post.description: Register a model. Scope: model:admin.
Send a test prompt to a model. Scope: model:admin.

patch.description: Modify a model entry. Scope: model:admin.

get.description: List tenants (admin only). Scope: tenant:admin.

post.description: Create a new tenant. Scope: tenant:admin.

get.description: Retrieve a tenant by ID. Scope: tenant:read.
List all quota dimensions for a tenant. Scope: quota:read.

post.description: Create a quota for a tenant/dimension. Scope: quota:admin.

patch.description: Modify a quota limit. Scope: quota:admin.

get.description: List users in current workspace. Scope: user:read.

post.description: Invite a new user. Scope: user:admin.

get.description: Retrieve a user by ID. Scope: user:read.

delete.description: Remove a user from workspace. Scope: user:admin.

get.description: Get a workspace group definition. Scope: workspace:read.
List documents in a group. Scope: workspace:read.

post.description: Attach a document to a group. Scope: workspace:edit.

delete.description: Detach a document from a group. Scope: workspace:edit.

get.description: List projects for a bot. Scope: workspace:read.

post.description: Add a document to a project. Scope: workspace:edit.

get.description: List documents in a project. Scope: workspace:read.
Reindex the workspace for a given scope. Scope: workspace:admin.
List all projects. Scope: workspace:read.

post.description: Create a new project. Scope: workspace:edit.

get.description: Retrieve a project by ID. Scope: workspace:read.

post.description: Upload a binary file. Scope: file:write.

get.description: Stream a file from the workspace storage.
List all bots in current tenant.

post.description: Register a new bot.

get.description: Retrieve a bot by name.
Get the public profile of a bot.

post.description: Pause a bot from receiving traffic.
Resume a paused bot.

get.description: List peer bot connections in the cluster.
List long-term memories for current bot.
Aggregate memory statistics.
List agent templates.

post.description: Create a new template.

get.description: Retrieve a template by name.
List tasks.

post.description: Create a new task.

get.description: Retrieve a task by ID.
Get current sync configuration.

post.description: Trigger a sync run.

get.description: List past sync runs.
List user sessions.

post.description: Start a new session.

get.description: Retrieve a session.

post.description: Append a message to a session.

get.description: List messages of a session.

post.description: Create a realtime room.
Get a join token for an RTC room.

delete.description: Close and clean up an RTC room.

post.description: Process a voice message (transcribe + respond).
Convert text to speech.

get.description: Get current resource usage for the tenant.
Get remaining balance.

post.description: Add credits to the tenant balance.
Record a usage event for a channel.

get.description: Get aggregated reports by dimension (token/skill/mcp/channel/knowledge). Scope: reports:read, reports:admin.
Export a report dimension as CSV. Scope: reports:read, reports:admin.
Aggregate dashboard metrics. Scope: admin:read.
Component health snapshot. Scope: admin:read.
List active alerts. Scope: admin:read.
Get diagnostic output for a task ID. Scope: admin:read.
List recent audit log entries. Scope: admin:read.
Cost breakdown by dimension. Scope: admin:read.
List configured channels. Scope: channel:read.

post.description: Register a new channel. Scope: channel:admin.
Override the per-user rate limit. **L4 Phase 4.** Scope: admin:admin.

delete.description: Remove a user override. **L4 Phase 4.** Scope: admin:admin.

get.description: Inspect a user's current rate limit state. **L4 Phase 4.** Scope: admin:admin.

post.description: Run an AI generation task. Scope: admin:admin.

get.description: Get the result of a generation task. Scope: admin:read.

post.description: Run cleanup jobs (sessions, cache, etc). Scope: admin:admin.
Rebuild search indexes. Scope: admin:admin.
Trigger a backup. Scope: admin:admin.

get.description: List recent activity events. Supports filtering by botName, since (timestamp), and limit. Scope: admin:read.

x-ws-messages.description: WebSocket message types supported by /ws endpoint. Inbound = client -> server; Outbound = server -> client. Chat/group-specific message types (chat, proxy_message, stop, answer, group_*) are intentionally excluded from this v1.1 spec per the delete-chat decision.

messages.description: Initial connection response with bot roster
Bot roster updated (new bots available or status change)
Streaming state update for in-progress message (tool use, etc.)
Final state of a completed message
Error event for a chatId or global error
File attachment reference (url, name, mimeType, size)
List of sessions for a bot
Confirm a session was adopted; includes history
Pipeline run progress broadcast (runId, pipelineId, status, completedNodes, totalNodes, progress)
